title: The Traveling Circus
subtitle: Lanternveil
synopsis: Mira Eggwarden, Spark, and their companions follow the Meridian collection trail to the Lanternveil Traveling Circus. Wonder hides wards, infiltrators, and the Shellward crystal. A public battle frees a controlled companion and points the map toward the Lost City — where the Guardian remembers.

pages.title: Roads Beneath Lanterns
pages.beat: Full splash: team sees Lanternveil Circus at twilight; Spark glows.
transcript: NARRATION: Some places are built on roads. Others build the road beneath them.

pages.title: Step Right In
pages.beat: Team enters; Thornling distracted; Bramblefox scans; Spark watches ring leaps.
transcript: SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): Stay close. Wonder first — answers second.

pages.title: The Greeter Notices
pages.beat: Masked greeter welcomes Mira; Spark markings pulse to lantern; greeter hides reaction.
transcript: SPEECH (Masked Greeter): Welcome, Keepers. Lanternveil opens for the curious — and the careful.
THOUGHT (Masked Greeter): …Riftborn markings. Not here. Not loud.
WHISPER (Mira Eggwarden): You felt that too.

pages.title: Wonder Market
pages.beat: Warm montage: food, care tents, card booths, games, merchants, kids meeting companions.

pages.title: Snack Catastrophe
pages.beat: Thornling comic food stall incident; Mossprig helps; Spark briefly laughs/relaxes.
transcript: SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): Even chaos can be Compact if nobody gets hurt.

pages.title: Lanternmaster Knows the Name
pages.beat: Mira meets Lanternmaster; he knows Spark's name; Mira sees ancient Rift symbol on wall.
transcript: SPEECH (Lanternmaster): Mira Eggwarden. And Spark — Subject One, if the hunters' gossip is to be believed.
SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): We don't use that name.
SPEECH (Lanternmaster): Safety is a stage light. It shows what I choose to show.
THOUGHT (Mira Eggwarden): That mark… Shellward's cousin.

pages.title: Not Neatly in a Codex
pages.beat: Lanternmaster: shelters that don't fit Codex; Mira asks Riftborn; he avoids.
transcript: SPEECH (Lanternmaster): We shelter what does not fit neatly inside a Codex.
SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): Riftborn. Say the word if you know it.
SPEECH (Lanternmaster): Words are costumes. Come see the show — truth prefers an audience.
WHISPER (Mira Eggwarden): That's not an answer.

pages.title: Curtain Call Begins
pages.beat: Main performance; introduce Lumenhare; acrobatics/illusion/elemental demos.
transcript: NARRATION: Wonder is honest. Motives rarely are.

pages.title: Ghosts Under the Boards
pages.beat: Wisplet detects trapped spirits under stage; Spirit Moth pulse; Spark uneasy.
transcript: SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): Something's wrong under the stage.
NARRATION: Applause can be a lid.

pages.title: Resonance Meeting
pages.beat: Spark meets Lumenhare backstage; nonverbal resonance recognition.
transcript: NARRATION: They speak without owning each other.

pages.title: Don't Ask Backstage
pages.beat: Performer warns Mira; Bramblefox sees Meridian tracking sigil.
transcript: SPEECH (Seris Vale): Keepers shouldn't ask questions backstage. Spoilers ruin the act.
SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): Funny. Spoilers usually hide behind badges.

pages.title: Restricted Wagon
pages.beat: Thornling chases snack cart into restricted wagon; crates; broken Rift restraint.
transcript: NARRATION: Not circus brass. Hunter iron.
SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): That's a collar. Not a costume.

pages.title: Archive of Routes
pages.beat: Archive wagon: Riftborn records MISSING/CAPTURED/HIDDEN.
transcript: NARRATION: They kept records the Codex never dared to finish.

pages.title: Ember Route
pages.beat: Spark sees self-like image; Resonance Bearer Ember Route; multiple routes.
transcript: SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): Not one accident. Several roads.

pages.title: Crystal in the Vault
pages.beat: Bramblefox leads to vault; Shellward crystal seen; alarms.
transcript: NARRATION: Not stolen by hunters. Held under lantern law.

pages.title: Sabotage
pages.beat: Grand performance sabotaged; Rift engine overload; controlled companion breaks free.
transcript: NARRATION: The act ends. The trap begins.

pages.title: Living Bulwark
pages.beat: Crowds flee; Mossprig shields civilians; Mira organizes companions.
transcript: SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): Bramblefox flank. Thornling energy. Spark — with me, not as a weapon.

pages.title: Grand Chaos
pages.beat: Battle spread: Pulse Step, flank, Sprouting Energy, Grand Illusion, Wisplet phases cables.
transcript: NARRATION: Consent is a formation. Fear is a stampede.

pages.title: Not Evil — Collared
pages.beat: Mira realizes creature controlled; Spark approaches despite danger.
transcript: SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): It's not choosing this.

pages.title: Spark Chooses
pages.beat: Mira refuses to order Spark; Spark chooses; Spark + Lumenhare combine.
transcript: SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): I won't order you forward. If you go, you choose.

pages.title: Quiet Betrayal of the Hunt
pages.beat: Nira disables control relay; Bramblefox destroys restraint; Ironmantle freed.
transcript: WHISPER (Nira Quill): Not another Subject One. Not like this.

pages.title: Lanternmaster Unmasked in Battle
pages.beat: Freed creature turns on infiltrators; Lanternmaster combat; infiltrators retreat.
transcript: SHOUT (Seris Vale): We have enough for the Lost City team—!
SPEECH (Lanternmaster): Exit stage left. Curtain's mine.

pages.title: We Move Them
pages.beat: Aftermath; Lanternmaster admits circus protected Riftborn; crystal protected.
transcript: SPEECH (Lanternmaster): We have moved Riftborn between safe places for generations. Stages make better walls than prisons — sometimes.
SPEECH (Lanternmaster): Your sanctuary crystal was never Meridian loot. It was lantern cargo.
SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): Protection and imprisonment share a door. Which side are you on when it closes?

pages.title: Map of Thresholds
pages.beat: Secret map: Commons, sanctuary, circus, Lost City; pulse under Lost City.
transcript: CAPTION: COMMONS · SANCTUM · CIRCUS · LOST CITY
SPEECH (Lanternmaster): The road remembers where hearts still sleep.

pages.title: The Guardian Remembers
pages.beat: Lost City night cliffhanger; towers light; shadow; NEXT THE LOST CITY.
transcript: TELEPATHY (Beneath the Ruins): The Guardian remembers.
